description: Salesforce Omnistudio Omniscripts — guided UI workflows, elements, actions, best practices. LLM-ready reference docs distilled from official Salesforce Help.
rules: Use Omniscripts for guided user-facing workflows (forms, wizards), not for backend-only orchestration.
For backend orchestration use Integration Procedures instead.
Always preview and test Omniscripts before activation.
Use Data Mapper actions to read/write Salesforce data, not direct DML.
For complex UI customization, prefer custom LWC over heavy CSS overrides.
